title: AccessProfile
description: A reusable access and consumption profile describing who may consume or act on governed content in which environments and for which purposes.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

subjects.description: Refs to subject classes, principals, groups, or identities covered by the profile.

purposes.description: Named purposes for which access is allowed.

allowedContentRefs.description: Optional allowlist of content or release refs this profile governs.

allowedEnvironments.description: Named environments or rings in which the profile is valid.

obligations.description: Named obligations or control requirements attached to this profile.

expiresAt.description: Optional ISO 8601 expiry for the profile or current issuance.
